mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID as userId, USER_PW as userPw, USER_NICK as userNick, CRYSTAL, TRAIN_POINT as trainPoint, TEAM_NAME as teamName FROM TBL_USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_PW = #{userPw}
SELECT USER_ID as userId, CRYSTAL, TRAIN_POINT as trainPoint FROM TBL_USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
